rationale: Made runtime_id field required in dashboard Create Profile form.
Replaced falsy || fallback with Number.isFinite check to preserve 0 for cooldown_after_429_seconds.
Removed _RUNTIME_ALIASES translation shim. Added codex_cli and claude_code as first-class keys in runtime lookup dicts so all callers can use canonical system-wide IDs directly.
Added default_model and model_overrides to provider_profile_list activity payload so adapter receives profile-level defaults.
Optimized seed query to select only profile_id and default_model columns. Used explicit UPDATE for backfilling rows. Updated docstring to mention backfill behavior.
Qodo review summary comment — informational only, no action required.
Gemini bot error message — informational only, no action required.
Copilot PR overview summary comment — informational only, individual issues addressed by other comments.
